title: auth.user.created v1
description: Emitted when a new user account is provisioned. Source: alebrije-svc-auth (Python). NO password, token, or session data ever included.

user_id.description: UUID of the created user (PK in auth DB).

role.description: Initial role assigned (e.g. member, admin, superadmin).

invited_by.description: UUID of the user who sent the invitation, if applicable.

onboarding_flow.description: Onboarding flow identifier (e.g. magic_link, invite, sso).
